name: neoMAXX
title: neoMAXX
definition: neoMAXX is a concept created by Joz Krupa. It creates novel, high-quality products, services, and experiences by combining human judgment with AI-powered design, engineering, code, and computation.
summary: The conceptual intelligence layer connecting human judgment, AI capability, and execution.

name: Gold Pill
title: Gold Pill
definition: The Gold Pill represents the combination of skills, capabilities, competences, judgment, creativity, technical ability, design, engineering, and execution required to create high-quality innovation with AI.
summary: A capability metaphor for turning combined skill, judgment, and AI into innovation.
distinction: Other pill metaphors claim to explain reality. The Gold Pill represents the capability to create new reality through innovation.

name: Flex
title: Flex
definition: Flex is the arrival and presence layer of Meet Joz. It establishes vibe, atmosphere, tone, and identity before the experience moves into deeper discovery and proof.
summary: Arrival, presence, vibe, atmosphere, tone, and identity.

name: Ascend
title: Ascend
definition: Ascend is the discovery and progression layer of Meet Joz. It reveals scale, recognition, transformation, and visible proof.
summary: Discovery, progression, prestige, scale, recognition, and proof.

name: Mogg
title: Mogg
definition: Mogg is Joz's digital twin and identity layer. It represents a concentrated, high-signal presence before the experience moves into deeper skills and execution.
summary: Digital twin, identity, concentrated signal, and undeniable presence.

name: Workf
title: Workf
definition: Workf is the deep work and skills layer of Meet Joz. It reveals Joz's capabilities, technical depth, enterprise experience, and ability to turn ideas into measurable outcomes.
summary: Deep work, skills, technical depth, execution, and enterprise delivery.

name: Worldx
title: Worldx
definition: Worldx is the abstract gold semantic city surrounding the Meet Joz controlled sequence. It acts as the environment of proof, aura, and capability around Flex, Ascend, Mogg, and Workf.
summary: Abstract gold semantic city, 360 environment, proof landmarks, aura, and capability context.

name: Aura
title: Aura
definition: Aura is the emotional and perceptual field created by the experience. It is the presence and feeling perceived before conscious analysis begins.
summary: Emotional and perceptual field, presence, atmosphere, and felt quality.

name: Frame
title: Frame
definition: Frame is the underlying structure that shapes perception. Strong framing creates coherence, proportion, clarity, and presence.
summary: Structure, proportion, coherence, style, and perceptual clarity.

name: Ascension
title: Ascension
definition: Ascension is the disciplined process of refinement through consistency, precision, conditioning, and sustained iteration.
summary: Consistency, precision, discipline, conditioning, iteration, and refinement.

name: Dominance
title: Dominance
definition: Dominance is the strength and clarity of a signal. It describes the point where quality, precision, and presence become impossible to ignore.
summary: Signal strength, presence, impact, authority, confidence, and clarity.

name: 10/10 Frame Mogg
title: 10/10 Frame Mogg
definition: 10/10 Frame Mogg is the structure and perception layer of The Elite Beauty. It focuses on proportion, symmetry, style, and aura as signals of quality and presence.
summary: Structure, proportion, symmetry, style, aura, and perceptual quality.

name: The Elite Beauty
title: The Elite Beauty
definition: The Elite Beauty is the Neurodesign layer inside MAXX. It combines Ascension, 10/10 Frame Mogg, aura, and perception design into a deliberate system of refinement, structure, and signal.
summary: The Neurodesign layer combining Ascension, Frame Mogg, aura, and perception design.
